chapter_description: Periodic trends, blocks, properties, electron configurations

questions.text: Which property generally increases across a period in the periodic table?
questions.explanation: Electronegativity increases left to right as nuclear charge increases and atomic radius decreases.

questions.text: Which block in the periodic table contains the lanthanides?
questions.explanation: Lanthanides (4f series) belong to the f-block.

questions.text: How many elements are in the 3rd period of the periodic table?
questions.explanation: 3rd period: Na, Mg, Al, Si, P, S, Cl, Ar → 8 elements
